title: K6 Performance Tests
description: Pass rates, check failures, suite breakdown, and flakiness for K6 load tests ingested via format=K6.

list.name: team
list.label: Team
list.query: SELECT slug FROM teams ORDER BY name

list.name: project
list.label: Project
list.query: SELECT p.slug FROM projects p JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id WHERE '$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team' ORDER BY p.name

list.name: suite
list.label: Suite
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT te.suite_name FROM test_executions te JOIN projects p ON p.id = te.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id WHERE te.source_format = 'K6' AND te.suite_name <> '' AND ('$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team') AND ('$project' = 'All' OR p.slug = '$project') ORDER BY te.suite_name

list.name: environment
list.label: Environment
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT te.environment FROM test_executions te WHERE te.source_format = 'K6' ORDER BY te.environment

panels.title: Total Runs
panels.description: K6 test executions ingested in the selected time range.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Total Runs" FROM test_executions te JOIN projects p ON p.id = te.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id WHERE $__timeFilter(te.executed_at) AND te.source_format = 'K6' AND ('$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team') AND ('$project' = 'All' OR p.slug = '$project') AND ('$suite' = 'All' OR te.suite_name = '$suite') AND ('$environment' = 'All' OR te.environment = '$environment')

panels.title: Avg Pass Rate
panels.description: Average check pass rate across all K6 runs in the time range.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND((SUM(passed) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(total_tests), 0))::numeric, 1) AS "Pass Rate" FROM test_executions te JOIN projects p ON p.id = te.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id WHERE $__timeFilter(te.executed_at) AND te.source_format = 'K6' AND ('$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team') AND ('$project' = 'All' OR p.slug = '$project') AND ('$suite' = 'All' OR te.suite_name = '$suite') AND ('$environment' = 'All' OR te.environment = '$environment')

panels.title: Total Checks
panels.description: Sum of all individual K6 checks executed.

targets.rawSql: SELECT SUM(total_tests) AS "Total Checks" FROM test_executions te JOIN projects p ON p.id = te.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id WHERE $__timeFilter(te.executed_at) AND te.source_format = 'K6' AND ('$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team') AND ('$project' = 'All' OR p.slug = '$project') AND ('$suite' = 'All' OR te.suite_name = '$suite') AND ('$environment' = 'All' OR te.environment = '$environment')

panels.title: Failed Checks
panels.description: Total check failures across all K6 runs.

targets.rawSql: SELECT SUM(failed) AS "Failed Checks" FROM test_executions te JOIN projects p ON p.id = te.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id WHERE $__timeFilter(te.executed_at) AND te.source_format = 'K6' AND ('$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team') AND ('$project' = 'All' OR p.slug = '$project') AND ('$suite' = 'All' OR te.suite_name = '$suite') AND ('$environment' = 'All' OR te.environment = '$environment')

panels.title: Suites Run
panels.description: Distinct K6 test suites seen in the time range.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT suite_name) AS "Suites" FROM test_executions te JOIN projects p ON p.id = te.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id WHERE $__timeFilter(te.executed_at) AND te.source_format = 'K6' AND te.suite_name <> '' AND ('$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team') AND ('$project' = 'All' OR p.slug = '$project') AND ('$environment' = 'All' OR te.environment = '$environment')

panels.title: Last Run
panels.description: Time since the most recent K6 execution was ingested.

targets.rawSql: SELECT EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM MAX(te.executed_at)) * 1000 AS "Last Run" FROM test_executions te JOIN projects p ON p.id = te.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id WHERE te.source_format = 'K6' AND ('$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team') AND ('$project' = 'All' OR p.slug = '$project') AND ('$suite' = 'All' OR te.suite_name = '$suite') AND ('$environment' = 'All' OR te.environment = '$environment')

panels.title: Pass Rate Over Time
panels.description: Daily check pass rate. Drop below 95% indicates degraded performance thresholds.

targets.rawSql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', te.executed_at) AS time, te.suite_name AS metric, ROUND((SUM(te.passed) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(te.total_tests), 0))::numeric, 1) AS "Pass Rate" FROM test_executions te JOIN projects p ON p.id = te.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id WHERE $__timeFilter(te.executed_at) AND te.source_format = 'K6' AND ('$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team') AND ('$project' = 'All' OR p.slug = '$project') AND ('$suite' = 'All' OR te.suite_name = '$suite') AND ('$environment' = 'All' OR te.environment = '$environment') GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('day', te.executed_at), te.suite_name ORDER BY time

panels.title: Checks Volume
panels.description: Daily count of passed vs failed checks.

targets.rawSql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', te.executed_at) AS time, 'Passed' AS metric, SUM(te.passed)::bigint AS value FROM test_executions te JOIN projects p ON p.id = te.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id WHERE $__timeFilter(te.executed_at) AND te.source_format = 'K6' AND ('$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team') AND ('$project' = 'All' OR p.slug = '$project') AND ('$suite' = 'All' OR te.suite_name = '$suite') AND ('$environment' = 'All' OR te.environment = '$environment') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', te.executed_at) AS time, 'Failed' AS metric, SUM(te.failed)::bigint AS value FROM test_executions te JOIN projects p ON p.id = te.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id WHERE $__timeFilter(te.executed_at) AND te.source_format = 'K6' AND ('$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team') AND ('$project' = 'All' OR p.slug = '$project') AND ('$suite' = 'All' OR te.suite_name = '$suite') AND ('$environment' = 'All' OR te.environment = '$environment') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Pass Rate by Suite
panels.description: Current pass rate per K6 suite (test file) over the selected period.

targets.rawSql: SELECT te.suite_name AS "Suite", ROUND((SUM(te.passed) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(te.total_tests), 0))::numeric, 1) AS "Pass Rate" FROM test_executions te JOIN projects p ON p.id = te.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id WHERE $__timeFilter(te.executed_at) AND te.source_format = 'K6' AND te.suite_name <> '' AND ('$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team') AND ('$project' = 'All' OR p.slug = '$project') AND ('$environment' = 'All' OR te.environment = '$environment') GROUP BY te.suite_name ORDER BY "Pass Rate" ASC

panels.title: Suite Summary
panels.description: Aggregate totals per K6 suite.

targets.rawSql: SELECT te.suite_name AS "Suite", COUNT(*) AS "Runs", SUM(te.total_tests) AS "Checks", SUM(te.passed) AS "Passed", SUM(te.failed) AS "Failed", ROUND((SUM(te.passed) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(te.total_tests), 0))::numeric, 1) AS "Pass Rate" FROM test_executions te JOIN projects p ON p.id = te.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id WHERE $__timeFilter(te.executed_at) AND te.source_format = 'K6' AND te.suite_name <> '' AND ('$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team') AND ('$project' = 'All' OR p.slug = '$project') AND ('$environment' = 'All' OR te.environment = '$environment') GROUP BY te.suite_name ORDER BY "Pass Rate" ASC

panels.title: Top Failing Checks
panels.description: K6 checks with the most failures. test_id shows group path (e.g. 'Login Flow / status is 200').

targets.rawSql: SELECT tcr.test_id AS "Check", COUNT(*) AS "Failures", ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_case_results x JOIN test_executions xe ON xe.id = x.execution_id WHERE x.test_id = tcr.test_id AND xe.source_format = 'K6')::numeric, 1) AS "Failure Rate", MAX(tcr.failure_message) AS "Last Failure" FROM test_case_results tcr JOIN test_executions te ON te.id = tcr.execution_id JOIN projects p ON p.id = te.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id WHERE $__timeFilter(te.executed_at) AND te.source_format = 'K6' AND tcr.status IN ('FAILED', 'BROKEN') AND ('$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team') AND ('$project' = 'All' OR p.slug = '$project') AND ('$suite' = 'All' OR te.suite_name = '$suite') AND ('$environment' = 'All' OR te.environment = '$environment') GROUP BY tcr.test_id ORDER BY "Failures" DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Check Status Distribution
panels.description: Proportion of PASSED / FAILED / SKIPPED checks.

targets.rawSql: SELECT tcr.status AS "metric", COUNT(*) AS "value" FROM test_case_results tcr JOIN test_executions te ON te.id = tcr.execution_id JOIN projects p ON p.id = te.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id WHERE $__timeFilter(te.executed_at) AND te.source_format = 'K6' AND ('$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team') AND ('$project' = 'All' OR p.slug = '$project') AND ('$suite' = 'All' OR te.suite_name = '$suite') AND ('$environment' = 'All' OR te.environment = '$environment') GROUP BY tcr.status

panels.title: Flaky K6 Checks
panels.description: Checks classified FLAKY or CRITICAL_FLAKY by the platform's flakiness scorer. Score 0–1; higher = more flaky.

targets.rawSql: SELECT fs.test_id AS "Check", fs.classification AS "Class", fs.score AS "Score", fs.failure_rate AS "Fail Rate", fs.total_runs AS "Runs", fs.failure_count AS "Fails", fs.last_failed_at AS "Last Failed" FROM flakiness_scores fs JOIN projects p ON p.id = fs.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id WHERE fs.classification IN ('FLAKY', 'CRITICAL_FLAKY') AND fs.test_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT tcr.test_id FROM test_case_results tcr JOIN test_executions te ON te.id = tcr.execution_id WHERE te.source_format = 'K6' AND te.project_id = fs.project_id) AND ('$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team') AND ('$project' = 'All' OR p.slug = '$project') ORDER BY fs.score DESC LIMIT 25

panels.title: Recent K6 Runs
panels.description: Latest K6 executions. Click run_id to open CI link.

targets.rawSql: SELECT te.run_id AS "Run ID", te.suite_name AS "Suite", te.environment AS "Env", te.branch AS "Branch", te.total_tests AS "Checks", te.passed AS "Passed", te.failed AS "Failed", ROUND((te.passed * 100.0 / NULLIF(te.total_tests, 0))::numeric, 1) AS "Pass Rate", te.ci_run_url AS "CI", te.executed_at AS "Executed At" FROM test_executions te JOIN projects p ON p.id = te.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id WHERE $__timeFilter(te.executed_at) AND te.source_format = 'K6' AND ('$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team') AND ('$project' = 'All' OR p.slug = '$project') AND ('$suite' = 'All' OR te.suite_name = '$suite') AND ('$environment' = 'All' OR te.environment = '$environment') ORDER BY te.executed_at DESC LIMIT 50

panels.title: Performance Signals
panels.description: Response-time percentiles, throughput, error rate, and VU counts from the performance_metrics table (K6, Gatling, JMeter).

panels.title: Avg p95 Response Time
panels.description: Mean p95 HTTP response time across K6 runs in the selected time range.

targets.rawSql: SELECT AVG(pm.p95_ms) AS "p95 ms" FROM performance_metrics pm JOIN test_executions te ON te.id = pm.execution_id JOIN projects p ON p.id = te.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id WHERE $__timeFilter(te.executed_at) AND te.source_format = 'K6' AND pm.p95_ms IS NOT NULL AND ('$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team') AND ('$project' = 'All' OR p.slug = '$project') AND ('$suite' = 'All' OR te.suite_name = '$suite') AND ('$environment' = 'All' OR te.environment = '$environment')

panels.title: Avg p90 Response Time
panels.description: Mean p90 HTTP response time across K6 runs in the selected time range.

targets.rawSql: SELECT AVG(pm.p90_ms) AS "p90 ms" FROM performance_metrics pm JOIN test_executions te ON te.id = pm.execution_id JOIN projects p ON p.id = te.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id WHERE $__timeFilter(te.executed_at) AND te.source_format = 'K6' AND pm.p90_ms IS NOT NULL AND ('$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team') AND ('$project' = 'All' OR p.slug = '$project') AND ('$suite' = 'All' OR te.suite_name = '$suite') AND ('$environment' = 'All' OR te.environment = '$environment')

panels.title: Avg Error Rate
panels.description: Mean HTTP error rate (failed requests / total requests) across K6 runs.

targets.rawSql: SELECT AVG(pm.error_rate) AS "error_rate" FROM performance_metrics pm JOIN test_executions te ON te.id = pm.execution_id JOIN projects p ON p.id = te.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id WHERE $__timeFilter(te.executed_at) AND te.source_format = 'K6' AND pm.error_rate IS NOT NULL AND ('$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team') AND ('$project' = 'All' OR p.slug = '$project') AND ('$suite' = 'All' OR te.suite_name = '$suite') AND ('$environment' = 'All' OR te.environment = '$environment')

panels.title: Avg Throughput
panels.description: Mean HTTP requests per second across K6 runs.

targets.rawSql: SELECT AVG(pm.requests_per_second) AS "req/s" FROM performance_metrics pm JOIN test_executions te ON te.id = pm.execution_id JOIN projects p ON p.id = te.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id WHERE $__timeFilter(te.executed_at) AND te.source_format = 'K6' AND pm.requests_per_second IS NOT NULL AND ('$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team') AND ('$project' = 'All' OR p.slug = '$project') AND ('$suite' = 'All' OR te.suite_name = '$suite') AND ('$environment' = 'All' OR te.environment = '$environment')

panels.title: Peak VUs (Max)
panels.description: Maximum VUs recorded across any K6 run in the selected time range.

targets.rawSql: SELECT MAX(pm.vus_max) AS "vus_max" FROM performance_metrics pm JOIN test_executions te ON te.id = pm.execution_id JOIN projects p ON p.id = te.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id WHERE $__timeFilter(te.executed_at) AND te.source_format = 'K6' AND pm.vus_max IS NOT NULL AND ('$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team') AND ('$project' = 'All' OR p.slug = '$project') AND ('$suite' = 'All' OR te.suite_name = '$suite') AND ('$environment' = 'All' OR te.environment = '$environment')

panels.title: Response Time Trend
panels.description: p50 / p90 / p95 / p99 response time per K6 run over time. Helps spot performance regressions across deployments or load changes.

targets.rawSql: SELECT te.executed_at AS time, pm.median_ms AS "p50", pm.p90_ms AS "p90", pm.p95_ms AS "p95", pm.p99_ms AS "p99" FROM performance_metrics pm JOIN test_executions te ON te.id = pm.execution_id JOIN projects p ON p.id = te.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id WHERE $__timeFilter(te.executed_at) AND te.source_format = 'K6' AND ('$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team') AND ('$project' = 'All' OR p.slug = '$project') AND ('$suite' = 'All' OR te.suite_name = '$suite') AND ('$environment' = 'All' OR te.environment = '$environment') ORDER BY te.executed_at

panels.title: Error Rate Trend
panels.description: HTTP error rate per K6 run over time. Sustained rise in error rate indicates a reliability regression.

targets.rawSql: SELECT te.executed_at AS time, pm.error_rate AS "Error Rate" FROM performance_metrics pm JOIN test_executions te ON te.id = pm.execution_id JOIN projects p ON p.id = te.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id WHERE $__timeFilter(te.executed_at) AND te.source_format = 'K6' AND pm.error_rate IS NOT NULL AND ('$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team') AND ('$project' = 'All' OR p.slug = '$project') AND ('$suite' = 'All' OR te.suite_name = '$suite') AND ('$environment' = 'All' OR te.environment = '$environment') ORDER BY te.executed_at

panels.title: Throughput & VUs over Time
panels.description: Requests/second and peak VU count per K6 run. Correlated view shows if throughput scales with VU ramp.

targets.rawSql: SELECT te.executed_at AS time, pm.requests_per_second AS "req/s", pm.vus_max AS "VUs Max" FROM performance_metrics pm JOIN test_executions te ON te.id = pm.execution_id JOIN projects p ON p.id = te.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id WHERE $__timeFilter(te.executed_at) AND te.source_format = 'K6' AND ('$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team') AND ('$project' = 'All' OR p.slug = '$project') AND ('$suite' = 'All' OR te.suite_name = '$suite') AND ('$environment' = 'All' OR te.environment = '$environment') ORDER BY te.executed_at

panels.title: Performance Metrics History
panels.description: Raw performance metrics per K6 run — response time percentiles, throughput, error rate, and VU count.

targets.rawSql: SELECT te.executed_at AS "Executed At", te.suite_name AS "Suite", te.environment AS "Env", te.branch AS "Branch", ROUND(pm.avg_ms::numeric, 1) AS "Avg (ms)", ROUND(pm.median_ms::numeric, 1) AS "p50 (ms)", ROUND(pm.p90_ms::numeric, 1) AS "p90 (ms)", ROUND(pm.p95_ms::numeric, 1) AS "p95 (ms)", ROUND(pm.p99_ms::numeric, 1) AS "p99 (ms)", ROUND(pm.requests_per_second::numeric, 1) AS "Req/s", pm.requests_total AS "Requests", ROUND(pm.error_rate::numeric, 4) AS "Error %", pm.vus_max AS "VUs Max" FROM performance_metrics pm JOIN test_executions te ON te.id = pm.execution_id JOIN projects p ON p.id = te.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id WHERE $__timeFilter(te.executed_at) AND te.source_format = 'K6' AND ('$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team') AND ('$project' = 'All' OR p.slug = '$project') AND ('$suite' = 'All' OR te.suite_name = '$suite') AND ('$environment' = 'All' OR te.environment = '$environment') ORDER BY te.executed_at DESC LIMIT 50
